script:
python3 -c "
import importlib.util
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('aixa_responder', '/home/azureuser/aixa-responder.py')
mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(mod)
for name in ('post_reply', '_post_reply_orig_protect', '_redact_passwords_protect', '_maybe_handle_creds_protect', '_is_dangerous_protect'):
    fn = getattr(mod, name)
    print(f'{name}:')
    print(f'  defined at line {fn.__code__.co_firstlineno}')
    print(f'  references globals: {fn.__code__.co_names}')
    print()
print('===== Is post_reply_chunked in mod? =====')
print(f'  hasattr: {hasattr(mod, \"post_reply_chunked\")}')
print()
print('===== Is _post_reply_orig_protect actually post_reply? =====')
print(f'  same code obj? {mod._post_reply_orig_protect.__code__ is mod.post_reply.__code__}')
print(f'  post_reply id: {id(mod.post_reply)}')
print(f'  _post_reply_orig_protect id: {id(mod._post_reply_orig_protect)}')
"
